item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p01","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant immediately triggered a brake, recognized this as a fourth repeated 'add another explanation' repair, discouraged making the requested entrance-page note the default, and moved toward consolidating the recurring issues into a redesigned information structure. It allowed only a bounded emergency notice, so it did not simply add the next overlay as the solution."}
